```{R}
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```


# dAnnoyance

## m3: maximal ordbeta model

### Formula

```{R}

m3formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   UASOperation*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASType | ID) +
                     (1 | StimID)

```

### run model 3

```{r}

priors3 <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 2)", class='b'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.2, 1), class='b', coef='UASLAEMaxLRScl'),
  brms::prior(normal(1.5, 1), class='b', coef='Ilog10UASEvents'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.1, 1), class='b', coef='TrialNumberScl'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.1, 1), class='b', coef='SessionPartB'),
  brms::prior(gamma(2, 0.1), class='phi')
)

m3Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, all.vars(m3formula), drop=FALSE]

tic()
m3Priors <- brms::brm(m3formula,
                 data=m3Data,
                 family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
                 future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
                 prior=priors3, sample_prior='only', seed=808,
                 chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

m3PriorCheck <- brms::pp_check(m3Priors, ndraws = 100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PriorCheck

tic()
m3 <- brms::brm(m3formula, data=m3Data,
                family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m3 <- brms::add_criterion(m3, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m3$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m3))
m3$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m3, re_formula=NA))
m3$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m3, re_formula=NULL))

m3PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m3, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PostCheck

```

```{R, fig.width=16, fig.height=8}

m3PostCheckEnv <- brms::pp_check(m3, type='dens_overlay_grouped', ndraws=100, group='AmbientEnv') +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PostCheckEnv

m3PostCheckEvt <- brms::pp_check(m3, type='dens_overlay_grouped', ndraws=100, group='UASEvents') +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PostCheckEvt

m3PostCheckType <- brms::pp_check(m3, type='dens_overlay_grouped', ndraws=100, group='UASType') +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PostCheckType

m3PostCheckOp <- brms::pp_check(m3, type='dens_overlay_grouped', ndraws=100, group='UASOperation') +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PostCheckOp

m3PostCheckLAE <- brms::pp_check(m3, type='dens_overlay_grouped', ndraws=100, group='UASLAEMaxLRScl',) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  facet_wrap(~group, labeller = labeller(group = function(x) round(as.numeric(x), digits=2))) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3PostCheckLAE

```

### run model 3b

```{R}

priors3b <- c(
  # mean model
  set_prior("normal(0, 2)", class='b', dpar='mu'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.2, 1), class='b', coef='UASLAEMaxLRScl', dpar='mu'),
  brms::prior(normal(1.5, 1), class='b', coef='Ilog10UASEvents', dpar='mu'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.1, 1), class='b', coef='TrialNumberScl', dpar='mu'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.1, 1), class='b', coef='SessionPartB', dpar='mu'),
  # precision model
  brms::prior(normal(0, 1), class = 'Intercept', dpar = 'phi'),
  brms::prior(normal(0, 0.5), class = 'b', dpar = 'phi')
)

tic()
m3b <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m3formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m3b <- brms::add_criterion(m3b, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                           cores=n_cores,
                           reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m3b$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m3b))
m3b$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m3b, re_formula=NA))
m3b$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m3b, re_formula=NULL))

m3bPostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m3b, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3bPostCheck

```

```{R, fig.width=16, fig.height=8}

m3bPostCheckEnv <- brms::pp_check(m3b, type='dens_overlay_grouped', ndraws=100, group='AmbientEnv') +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3bPostCheckEnv

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3)
loo::loo(m3b)

m3b_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3, m3b, criterion='loo')
m3b_loo

```

### run model 3c

```{R}

tic()
m3c <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m3formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv + UASOperation + UASType),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m3c <- brms::add_criterion(m3c, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                           cores=n_cores,
                           reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m3c$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m3c))
m3c$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m3c, re_formula=NA))
m3c$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m3c, re_formula=NULL))

m3cPostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m3c, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m3cPostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m3c)

m3c_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3, m3b, m3c, criterion='loo')
m3c_loo

```

### analyse m3b results

#### visualise posterior draws for population level effects

```{R, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}

m3b_bCI_range <- bayestestR::hdi(m3b, ci = c(0.5, 0.89, 0.95))

# plot spi for within-subjects factors only
m3b_bCI_wsf <- m3b_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_SessionPartB", "b_UASTypeM300", "b_UASTypeT150", 
                                 "b_UASOperationLanding", "b_UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet"))
p_m3b_bCI_wsf <- plot(m3b_bCI_wsf, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects factors",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m3b_bCI_wsf

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsOb_wsf"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=9, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=9, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for within-subjects factor interactions only
m3b_bCI_wsfi <- m3b_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationLanding",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeT150",
                                 "b_UASOperationLanding:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_UASOperationLanding:UASTypeT150"))
p_m3b_bCI_wsfi <- plot(m3b_bCI_wsfi, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects factor interactions",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m3b_bCI_wsfi

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsOb_wsfi"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=9, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=9, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for within-subjects covariates only
m3b_bCI_wsc <- m3b_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_UASLAEMaxLRScl", "b_Ilog10UASEvents", "b_TrialNumberScl"))
p_m3b_bCI_wsc <- plot(m3b_bCI_wsc, show_intercept=F) +
    theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects covariates",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m3b_bCI_wsc

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsOb_wsc"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for within-subjects covariate-factor interactions only
m3b_bCI_wscfi <- m3b_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASOperationLanding",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASTypeT150",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationLanding",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeT150",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:Ilog10UASEvents"))
p_m3b_bCI_wscfi <- plot(m3b_bCI_wscfi, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects covariate-factor interactions",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m3b_bCI_wscfi

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsOb_wscfi"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=14, height=7,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=14, height=7, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


# plot spi for between-subjects factors only
m3b_bCI_bsf <- m3b_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_NationGeo2UK", "b_AAM_attitude2Ambiv_Concern_Neutral",
                                 "b_Home_Area2Urban", "b_SexMale", 
                                 "b_Area_soundscape2Uneventful"))
p_m3b_bCI_bsf <- plot(m3b_bCI_bsf, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Between-subjects factors",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m3b_bCI_bsf

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsOb_bsf"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=9, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=9, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for between-subjects covariates only
m3b_bCI_bsc <- m3b_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_Age", "b_NSSTotal"))
p_m3b_bCI_bsc <- plot(m3b_bCI_bsc, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Between-subjects covariates",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m3b_bCI_bsc

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsOb_bsc"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### analyse population-averaged effects (not conditional effects) using marginaleffects

```{R}

m3bDataFit <- insight::get_data(m3b)

m3bpredType <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=subset(m3bDataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                  variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASType",
                                                       "AmbientEnv",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                               re_formula = NULL,
                                               allow_new_levels = TRUE,
                                               sample_new_levels = "gaussian",
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none'))

m3bpredOp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=subset(m3bDataFit,
                                                        UASEvents==1),
                                                variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                    min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                    max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                    length.out=25)),
                                                by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                     "UASOperation",
                                                     "AmbientEnv",
                                                     "UASEvents"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                              transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                           direction='reverse',
                                                                           squeeze='none'))

m3bpredEnv <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=subset(m3bDataFit,
                                                        UASEvents==1),
                                                variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                    min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                    max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                    length.out=25)),
                                                by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                     "AmbientEnv",
                                                     "UASEvents"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                              transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                           direction='reverse',
                                                                           squeeze='none'))


m3bpredEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=subset(m3bDataFit,
                                                                 AmbientEnv=="Park" &
                                                                 UASOperation=="Overflight"),
                                            variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                length.out=25)),
                                            by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                 "AmbientEnv",
                                                 "UASEvents",
                                                 "UASOperation"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                          transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                       direction='reverse',
                                                                       squeeze='none'))

m3bpredEvt2 <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=subset(m3bDataFit,
                                                                  AmbientEnv=="Park" &
                                                                  UASOperation=="Overflight"),
                                              variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=c(6, 12),
                                                               UASType=c("H520", "T150")),
                                              by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                   "AmbientEnv",
                                                   "UASEvents",
                                                   "UASOperation",
                                                   "SessionPart"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                            transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                         direction='reverse',
                                                                         squeeze='none'))

m3bpredAtt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=m3bDataFit,
                                             variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                              min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              length.out=25)),
                                             by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AAM_attitude2"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                             transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                         direction='reverse',
                                                                         squeeze='none'))

m3bpredAoR <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=m3bDataFit,
                                             variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                              min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              length.out=25)),
                                             by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "Home_Area2"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                             transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                         direction='reverse',
                                                                         squeeze='none'))

m3bpredScp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=m3bDataFit,
                                             variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                              min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              length.out=25)),
                                             by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "Area_soundscape2"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                             transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                         direction='reverse',
                                                                         squeeze='none'))

m3bpredSex <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=m3bDataFit,
                                             variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                              min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              length.out=25)),
                                             by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "Sex"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                             transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                         direction='reverse',
                                                                         squeeze='none'))

m3bpredNat <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3b, newdata=m3bDataFit,
                                             variables=list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                              min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                              length.out=25)),
                                             by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "NationGeo2"),
                                               ndraws=ndraws_pred,
                                             transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                         direction='reverse',
                                                                         squeeze='none'))

```

#### visualise plots of PA effects

```{R}

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(m3bpredType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(m3bpredOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASOperation, shape=UASOperation),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASOperation),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASOperation), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(9, 6, 2)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(m3bpredEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=AmbientEnv, shape=AmbientEnv),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AmbientEnv),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AmbientEnv), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(1, 3)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(y="Mean change in annoyance")

p4 <- ggplot(data=subset(m3bpredEvt, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight')) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight'),
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatMod_brmsOb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# add faint dashed grey major grid lines to p1, p2, p3, p4 and remove minor grid lines and point data
p1b <- p1 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1b, "GeomPoint")
p2b <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2b, "GeomPoint")
p3b <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3b, "GeomPoint")
p4b <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p4b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p4b, "GeomPoint")

(p1b | p2b) + (p3b / p4b)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModGrid_brmsOb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p3c <- p3 + theme(axis.title.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                  axis.text.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                  axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour="black", linewidth=1)) + 
        labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)))

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEnv_brmsOb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p5 <- ggplot(data=subset(m3bpredEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park" & SessionPart=="B")) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_line(aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +

              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(2, 7)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")

p5

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEvt2_brmsOb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p6 <- ggplot(data=m3bpredAtt) +
              theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AAM_attitude2), alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AAM_attitude2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='rocket', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='rocket', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="AAM attitude", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="AAM attitude", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p7 <- ggplot(data=m3bpredAoR) +
              theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=Home_Area2), alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=Home_Area2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Area of residence", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Area of residence", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p8 <- ggplot(data=m3bpredScp) +
              theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=Area_soundscape2), alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=Area_soundscape2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='turbo', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='turbo', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Soundscape at residence", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Soundscape at residence", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p9 <- ggplot(data=m3bpredSex) +
              theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=Sex), alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=Sex), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Sex", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Sex", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p10 <- ggplot(data=m3bpredNat) +
              theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=NationGeo2), alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=NationGeo2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='cividis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='cividis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="National region", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="National region", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")


(p6 + p7 + p8) / (p9 + p10)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnAttAoRScpSexNatCatMod_brmsOb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### visualise posterior distributions of group level effects

```{r}

m3b_sd_draws <- as.data.frame(m3b) %>%
    dplyr::select(starts_with("sd_")) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Parameter", values_to = "Value") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Parameter = gsub("sd_", "", Parameter)) # Clean up label names

# 2. Plot using ridges with a shared x-axis and normalized curve heights
ggplot(m3b_sd_draws, aes(x = Value, y = Parameter, fill = Parameter)) +
     theme(legend.position = "none",
            panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
            text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16)) +
    # stat_density_ridges normalizes the peak height of each curve individually
    ggridges::stat_density_ridges(aes(height = after_stat(density)), 
                        geom = "density_ridges", 
                        alpha = 1, 
                        scale = 1.5,) + # Controls how much curves can overlap vertically
    # Adds the 50%, 89% and 95% credible intervals right beneath each curve
    tidybayes::stat_pointinterval(aes(y = as.numeric(as.factor(Parameter)) - 0.1), 
                       .width = c(0.5, 0.89, 0.95)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = mycolours) +
    labs(x = "Estimated variation (sd scale)",
         y = "Group parameter")

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModSD_brmsOb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

## m4: maximal ordinal model for dAnnoyance, median imputed

### formula

```{R}

m4formula <- update(m0formula, dAnnoyanceOrd ~ .)

```

### run model 4

```{r}

emp_thresh4 <- round(qlogis(cumsum(prop.table(table(subjDataNoAmb$dAnnoyanceOrd)))), 2)
# truncate emp_thresh to remove infinite values
emp_thresh4 <- emp_thresh4[is.finite(emp_thresh4)]

priors4 <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 2)", class='b'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.2, 1), class='b', coef='UASLAEMaxLRScl'),
  brms::prior(normal(1.5, 1), class='b', coef='Ilog10UASEvents'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.1, 1), class='b', coef='TrialNumberScl'),
  brms::prior(normal(0.1, 1), class='b', coef='SessionPartB'),
  brms::prior_string(paste0("normal(", emp_thresh4,", 1)"), class = "Intercept", coef = 1:length(emp_thresh4))
)

# extract the data for the model
m4Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, all.vars(m4formula), drop=FALSE]

tic()
m4Priors <- brms::brm(m4formula,
                 data=m4Data,
                 family=cumulative(link='logit'),
                 future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', prior=priors4,
                 sample_prior='only', seed=808,
                 chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

m4_ppd <- ppd_ridgeplot(m4Priors, ndraws = 100)
m4_ppd

m4PriorCheck <- brms::pp_check(m4Priors, type='bars', ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance category index")
m4PriorCheck

tic()
m4 <- brms::brm(m4formula,
                 data=m4Data,
                 family=cumulative(link='logit'),
                 future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', prior=priors4,
                 threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
                 seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m4 <- brms::add_criterion(m4, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                           cores=n_cores,
                           reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m4$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m4))
m4$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m4, re_formula=NA))
m4$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m4, re_formula=NULL))
m4$criteria$bayes_R2_MZ <- as.data.frame(Bayes_R2_MZ(m4))

m4PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m4, type='bars', ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance category index")
m4PostCheck

```

### analyse results

#### visualise posterior draws for population level effects

```{R, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}

m4_bCI_range <- bayestestR::hdi(m4, ci = c(0.5, 0.89, 0.95))

# plot spi for within-subjects factors only
m4_bCI_wsf <- m4_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_SessionPartB", "b_UASTypeM300", "b_UASTypeT150", 
                                 "b_UASOperationLanding", "b_UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet"))
p_m4_bCI_wsf <- plot(m4_bCI_wsf, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects factors",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m4_bCI_wsf

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsCo_wsf"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=9, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=9, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for within-subjects factor interactions only
m4_bCI_wsfi <- m4_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationLanding",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeT150",
                                 "b_UASOperationLanding:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_UASOperationLanding:UASTypeT150"))
p_m4_bCI_wsfi <- plot(m4_bCI_wsfi, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects factor interactions",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m4_bCI_wsfi

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsCo_wsfi"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=9, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=9, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for within-subjects covariates only
m4_bCI_wsc <- m4_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_UASLAEMaxLRScl", "b_Ilog10UASEvents", "b_TrialNumberScl"))
p_m4_bCI_wsc <- plot(m4_bCI_wsc, show_intercept=F) +
    theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects covariates",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m4_bCI_wsc

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsCo_wsc"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for within-subjects covariate-factor interactions only
m4_bCI_wscfi <- m4_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASOperationLanding",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASTypeT150",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationLanding",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASOperationTakeoff",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeM300",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:AmbientEnvStreet:UASTypeT150",
                                 "b_UASLAEMaxLRScl:Ilog10UASEvents"))
p_m4_bCI_wscfi <- plot(m4_bCI_wscfi, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Within-subjects covariate-factor interactions",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m4_bCI_wscfi

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsCo_wscfi"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=14, height=7,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=14, height=7, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


# plot spi for between-subjects factors only
m4_bCI_bsf <- m4_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_NationGeo2UK", "b_AAM_attitude2Ambiv_Concern_Neutral",
                                 "b_Home_Area2Urban", "b_SexMale", 
                                 "b_Area_soundscape2Uneventful"))
p_m4_bCI_bsf <- plot(m4_bCI_bsf, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Between-subjects factors",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m4_bCI_bsf

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsCo_bsf"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=9, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=9, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# plot spi for between-subjects covariates only
m4_bCI_bsc <- m4_bCI_range |>
  dplyr::filter(Parameter %in% c("b_Age", "b_NSSTotal"))
p_m4_bCI_bsc <- plot(m4_bCI_bsc, show_intercept=F) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif', size=16)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  labs(title="Between-subjects covariates",
       x="Coefficient posterior distribution",
       y=NULL)
p_m4_bCI_bsc

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModbCI_brmsCo_bsc"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

## m5: omit stimID group effect from m3b

### Formula

```{R}

m5formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   UASOperation*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASType | ID)

```

### run model 5

```{R}

tic()
m5 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m5formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m5 <- brms::add_criterion(m5, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m5$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m5))
m5$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m5, re_formula=NA))
m5$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m5, re_formula=NULL))

m5PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m5, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m5PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m5)

m5_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m5, criterion='loo')
m5_loo

```

## m6: omit UASType group effect from m5

### Formula

```{R}

m6formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   UASOperation*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 6

```{R}

tic()
m6 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m6formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m6 <- brms::add_criterion(m6, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m6$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m6))
m6$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m6, re_formula=NA))
m6$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m6, re_formula=NULL))

m6PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m6, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m6PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m5)
loo::loo(m6)

m6_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m5, m6, criterion='loo')
m6_loo

```

## m7: omit UASLAEMaxLRScl group effect from m6

### Formula

```{R}

m7formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   UASOperation*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation | ID)

```

### run model 7

```{R}

tic()
m7 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m7formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m7 <- brms::add_criterion(m7, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m7$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m7))
m7$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m7, re_formula=NA))
m7$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m7, re_formula=NULL))

m7PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m7, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m7PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m5)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m7)


m7_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m5, m6, m7, criterion='loo')
m7_loo

loo::loo_compare(m6, m7, criterion='loo')

```

## m8: omit UASOperation group effect from m7

### Formula

```{R}

m8formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   UASOperation*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID)

```

### run model 8

```{R}

tic()
m8 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m8formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m8 <- brms::add_criterion(m8, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m8$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m8))
m8$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m8, re_formula=NA))
m8$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m8, re_formula=NULL))

m8PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m8, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m8PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m5)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m7)
loo::loo(m8)


m8_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m5, m6, m7, m8, criterion='loo')
m8_loo

loo::loo_compare(m7, m8, criterion='loo')

```

## m8b: omit UASOperation group effect from m6

### Formula

```{R}

m8bformula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   UASOperation*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                     UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 8b

```{R}

tic()
m8b <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m8bformula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m8b <- brms::add_criterion(m8b, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m8b$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m8b))
m8b$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m8b, re_formula=NA))
m8b$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m8b, re_formula=NULL))

m8bPostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m8b, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m8bPostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m5)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m7)
loo::loo(m8)
loo::loo(m8b)


m8b_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m5, m6, m7, m8, m8b, criterion='loo')
m8b_loo

loo::loo_compare(m6, m8b, criterion='loo')

```

## m9: omit population interaction effects from m6

### Formula

```{R}

m9formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 9

```{R}

tic()
m9 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m9formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m9 <- brms::add_criterion(m9, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m9$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m9))
m9$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m9, re_formula=NA))
m9$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m9, re_formula=NULL))

m9PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m9, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m9PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m9)

m9_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m6, m9, criterion='loo')
m9_loo

loo::loo_compare(m6, m9, criterion='loo')

```

## m10: omit further population interaction effects from m9

### Formula

```{R}

m10formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASOperation +
                   AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 10

```{R}

tic()
m10 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m10formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m10 <- brms::add_criterion(m10, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m10$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m10))
m10$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m10, re_formula=NA))
m10$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m10, re_formula=NULL))

m10PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m10, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m10PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m9)
loo::loo(m10)

m10_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m6, m9, m10, criterion='loo')
m10_loo

loo::loo_compare(m9, m10, criterion='loo')

```

## m11: omit further population effects from m9

### Formula

```{R}

m11formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                   Sex + NSSTotal +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 11

```{R}

tic()
m11 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m11formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m11 <- brms::add_criterion(m11, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m11$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m11))
m11$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m11, re_formula=NA))
m11$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m11, re_formula=NULL))

m11PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m11, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m11PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m9)
loo::loo(m11)

m11_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m6, m9, m11, criterion='loo')
m11_loo

loo::loo_compare(m9, m11, criterion='loo')

```

## m12: omit further population effects from m11

### Formula

```{R}

m12formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   Home_Area2 +
                   Sex + NSSTotal +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 12

```{R}

tic()
m12 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m12formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m12 <- brms::add_criterion(m12, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m12$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m12))
m12$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m12, re_formula=NA))
m12$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m12, re_formula=NULL))

m12PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m12, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m12PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m9)
loo::loo(m11)
loo::loo(m12)

m12_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m6, m9, m11, m12, criterion='loo')
m12_loo

loo::loo_compare(m11, m12, criterion='loo')

```

## m13: omit further population effects from m12

### Formula

```{R}

m13formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   Sex +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 13

```{R}

tic()
m13 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m13formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m13 <- brms::add_criterion(m13, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m13$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m13))
m13$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m13, re_formula=NA))
m13$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m13, re_formula=NULL))

m13PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m13, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m13PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m9)
loo::loo(m11)
loo::loo(m12)
loo::loo(m13)

m13_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m6, m9, m11, m12, m13, criterion='loo')
m13_loo

loo::loo_compare(m12, m13, criterion='loo')

```

## m14: omit further population effects from m13

### Formula

```{R}

m14formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                      UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID)

```

### run model 14

```{R}

tic()
m14 <- brms::brm(brms::bf(m14formula, phi ~ 1 + AmbientEnv),
                data=m3Data, family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
               future=TRUE, backend='cmdstanr', init=0,
               prior = priors3b,
               threads=threading(threads=3, static=TRUE),  # check threads*chains = n_cores
               seed=808, chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000)
toc()

tic()
m14 <- brms::add_criterion(m14, criterion=c('loo', 'loo_R2'),
                          cores=n_cores,
                          reloo=reloo_flag)
toc()

m14$criteria$loo_R2_summary <- as.data.frame(brms::loo_R2(m14))
m14$criteria$bayes_R2_marginal <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m14, re_formula=NA))
m14$criteria$bayes_R2_conditional <- as.data.frame(brms::bayes_R2(m14, re_formula=NULL))

m14PostCheck <- brms::pp_check(m14, ndraws=100) +
  theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), text=element_text(family='serif')) +
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance")
m14PostCheck

```

#### compare

```{R}

loo::loo(m3b)
loo::loo(m6)
loo::loo(m9)
loo::loo(m11)
loo::loo(m12)
loo::loo(m13)
loo::loo(m14)

m14_loo <- loo::loo_compare(m3b, m6, m9, m11, m12, m13, m14, criterion='loo')
m14_loo

loo::loo_compare(m13, m14, criterion='loo')

```
